Settings
SYSTEM ONLINE

Convex connected

Office
Canvas 480×320 · 16px tiles · A* pathing · pixel-art props from code
Agent
Friday
Click a character in the office to inspect.
offline
Current task
—
Behaviors
  • Active/Busy: walks to desk and types (frames 5–6)
  • Idle: wanders (kitchen/lounge/peers), sometimes returns to desk
  • Offline: hidden (parked at desk)
  • Door safety: agents never stop near doorways
Details
  • Day/night tint based on WIB time
  • Kitchen clock displays WIB
  • All furniture sprites are code-generated (no external office sprite sheet)
  • Characters use /public/char_*.png sheets
